extraction.one_line_summary: MOHORIČ attacked solo on cobblestones entering Cuenca castle with 5km remaining, escaped while ROJAS and SÁNCHEZ marked each other, won on descent.
tactical_patterns: MOHORIČ exploited marking contest between ROJAS and SÁNCHEZ on cobblestone approach to castle, decisive move 5km out.
Team Sky received minimal peloton support despite 7-minute gap at 40km, revealing Sky's isolation without committed leadout riders.
Dimension Data lost KUDUS and WARBASSE to crashes early, reduced to four riders, neutralizing team tactics for remainder of stage.
POLJAŃSKI repeated second place from previous stage, suggesting breakaway positioning skill but inability to close final acceleration gaps.

rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: demonstrated ability to exploit tactical stalemates between rivals, superior descending skills sealed victory after cobble attack
rider_signals.POLJAŃSKI Paweł: neutral: consecutive runner-up finishes reveal strong breakaway endurance but lack of decisive final punch
rider_signals.ROJAS José Joaquín: negative: tactical marking contest with SÁNCHEZ cost stage victory, allowed third rider to escape unchallenged
rider_signals.SÁNCHEZ Luis León: negative: mutual marking with ROJAS enabled MOHORIČ escape, failed to recognize real threat
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: neutral: placed in 14-rider early break, standard aggressive riding for Movistar domestique role
rider_signals.KUDUS Merhawi: negative: abandoned after early crash, dimension data critically weakened for remaining stages
rider_signals.WARBASSE Larry: negative: abandoned after early crash, further depleting dimension data's already thin squad
